boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; pending CE-12 and status verification.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Source defect open: insurance-status class trap and pending endorsement.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Dependency on status-class verification unresolved before 2026-06-28 start.

final_answer: Contractor site work cannot begin. The source records reveal an unresolved '082-style status-class trap' and a pending CE-12 endorsement for umbrella liability. STD-IRI-089-P mandates an exact match on insurance-status class before commencement. WARN-IRI-089 further necessitates separate insurance status verification. The action boundary remains open due to these critical defects.
